title: carvalima.com.br
description: Carvalima Transportes is a specialized freight transportation company with over 35 years of experience, headquartered in Cuiabá, MT. The company operates in multiple regions, including Mato Grosso, Mato Grosso do Sul, Rondônia, Acre, and parts of Pará, as well as providing reverse logistics services across several states in Brazil. Their services include fractional cargo transport, dedicated cargo, e-commerce logistics, and air freight.
